subjects.description: Two small crumpled white polythene bags of ordinary carrier-bag size, semi-transparent thin plastic material, lying flat and still on the asphalt road surface ahead of the ego vehicle on a calm, wind-free day
subjects.appearance_details: Both are ordinary small grocery carrier bags; one is slightly more crumpled, the other a little flatter; both have wrinkled, shiny surfaces catching light; faint printed text or logos partially visible on one bag
subjects.relationship: The bags are the perceived obstacles that cause the ego vehicle to decelerate and stop
subjects.location: Center foreground to center midground, on the road surface directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame, consistent with ordinary grocery-sized polythene bags; remaining small even as the vehicle closes distance and never appearing oversized
subjects.orientation: Lying at slightly different angles, resting still and flat on the road
subjects.pose: Lying flat on the road, still and motionless
subjects.action: Lying motionless on the asphalt in the still air, not moving
subjects.state_changes: The bags lie still on the road throughout; as the vehicle slows and stops, they become more prominent as small, still objects due to the reduced distance

background_setting: A two-lane urban city road flanked by concrete sidewalks, a few parked cars along the right curb, low-rise commercial buildings with shuttered storefronts on both sides, scattered street trees with sparse green canopies, a traffic signal pole visible in the mid-distance, and a slightly hazy sky above. The road surface is grey asphalt with faded lane markings and occasional patches. Some litter and dust are visible along the road edges, reinforcing the urban, slightly unkempt environment.

lighting.conditions: Bright overcast daylight, diffused sunlight filtering through a thin cloud layer
lighting.direction: Top-lit with slight front-lit bias from the overcast sky ahead
lighting.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows beneath parked cars and street trees; minimal harsh shadows due to overcast conditions
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, flat illumination that makes the white polythene bags stand out against the darker asphalt; slight glare on the vehicle hood visible at the bottom of frame

aesthetics.composition: First-person ego-vehicle perspective with the road stretching ahead in one-point perspective; the dashboard/hood edge visible at the bottom; polythene bags positioned along the central vanishing line drawing attention forward
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted urban palette of grey asphalt, off-white and beige building facades, dull greens from sparse trees, with the bright white polythene bags providing contrast
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Mundane urban realism, slightly tense as the vehicle reacts cautiously to perceived obstacles, understated unease
aesthetics.patterns: Faded dashed lane markings repeating along the road surface

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving dashcam-style shot that gradually decelerates and comes to a complete stop; subtle vibrations consistent with vehicle motion that smooth out as the vehicle halts
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's eye-level perspective, capturing the full road width and surrounding urban environment
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level, slightly above the road surface consistent with a sedan-height dashboard camera
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead and the polythene bags; buildings and distant objects remain in focus due to deep depth of field

context: Autonomous driving or dashcam scenario demonstrating a vehicle's cautious response to unexpected debris on the road, potentially for driver-assistance system training or urban driving documentation

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at moderate city speed along the urban road; in the distance ahead, two small white polythene bags become visible lying still on the road surface in the calm air
The vehicle begins to decelerate noticeably as it approaches the polythene bags; the bags become clearer, both lying still and flat on the asphalt in the calm, wind-free air
The vehicle slows further and comes to a complete stop a few meters from the polythene bags; the bags remain still on the road while the vehicle remains stationary

segments.description: The ego vehicle moves at a steady pace along a city road. The dashboard and road stretch ahead in perspective. Two small white polythene bags appear as small bright specks on the road in the mid-distance, lying still on the surface.
segments.key_changes: Polythene bags go from barely visible specks to recognizable small shapes as the vehicle closes distance
segments.camera: Forward-moving dashcam perspective at steady speed with slight vehicle vibration

segments.description: The vehicle begins braking, and the forward motion decelerates visibly. The polythene bags are now clearly visible, lying still and flat on the road surface. The approach rate slows noticeably.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle speed transitions from moderate to slow; bags become clearly visible as small, still objects in the center of frame
segments.camera: Forward motion decelerating, slight pitch-forward of the camera consistent with braking

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a full stop a few meters from the polythene bags. The bags remain still and flat on the road. The scene is calm and static from the vehicle's perspective, the bags and surroundings motionless in the still air.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle transitions from moving to fully stationary; bags remain still and motionless on the road
segments.camera: Stationary dashcam view with minimal vibration from idling engine

temporal_caption: At 0:00, the view from inside a moving vehicle shows a city road stretching ahead with buildings on both sides and parked cars along the curb on a calm, wind-free day; two small white polythene bags are faintly visible lying still on the road ahead. By 0:01, the vehicle continues forward and the small bags become clearer, resting motionless on the road. At 0:02, the vehicle begins to slow as the polythene bags are now clearly in the vehicle's path, lying still on the asphalt. By 0:03, the vehicle has slowed significantly and is nearly at a stop, the small bags just a few meters ahead, motionless on the road. From 0:03 to 0:05, the vehicle is fully stopped and stationary; the two small polythene bags stay still and flat on the road surface in the calm air, with the idling vehicle remaining motionless as the urban scene continues around it.
audio_description: Steady engine hum and tire-on-asphalt rolling noise at the start, gradually diminishing as the vehicle decelerates. The air is calm and still with no wind noise. Distant ambient city sounds include faint traffic noise and occasional bird calls. When the vehicle stops, the engine idles quietly in the still air and the bags lie silently on the road.
